questions.question: Explain the concept of rationality in the context of artificial intelligence and its application in intelligent agents. How does this concept influence the decision-making process of an agent?
Describe the nature of the environment in an intelligent agent. How does the environment affect the decision-making process of an agent? Provide an example.
Compare the structure of agents in a simple rule-based system and a more complex knowledge-based system. How do these structures influence the overall performance of an intelligent agent?
